description: InfoGenius v2 preset library. Two-track architecture: community/* presets are generic (open-source friendly, useful for anyone). frankx/* presets are brand-locked to FrankX palette + voice. Each preset declares its preferred model and intent — the /infogenius command uses these to drive the image-router without hardcoding.

namespaces.community: Generic, brand-neutral styles. Free to fork.
namespaces.frankx: Brand-locked to FrankX palette (#0F172A navy, #AB47C7 purple, #43BFE3 cyan, #F59E0B gold, #10B981 emerald). frankx.ai use only.

modelChoiceRules.grounded-factual: nano-banana — Gemini grounding + cheaper at 2K floor

presets.name: Editorial Flat
presets.description: Modern editorial 2-color flat with one accent. Large typography. Best default for blog heroes.
presets.promptFragment: Modern editorial illustration. Two-color flat design with a single accent color. Bold large typography (sans-serif). Generous negative space. Clean vector lines, no gradients, no photorealism. Stripe Press / The Browser / NYT opinion-section feel.
palette: editorial choice — pick 2 colors + 1 accent appropriate to topic
presets.composition: Asymmetric layout. Strong focal element offset from center. Headline-friendly negative space.

presets.name: Bauhaus Minimal
presets.description: Limited 2-3 color palette, geometric shapes, deep negative space. Restrained and intentional.
presets.promptFragment: Bauhaus minimalist composition. Strict 2-3 color palette. Pure geometric forms (circles, rectangles, triangles). Heavy reliance on negative space. No gradients, no textures, no decorative flourish. Swiss-design typography hints. Thinking-clear-into-form aesthetic.
presets.composition: Grid-based. One dominant geometric form anchors the composition.

presets.name: Photoreal Cinema
presets.description: Cinematic photorealism. 8K, dramatic lighting, depth of field, crafted composition.
presets.promptFragment: Cinematic photorealistic composite. 8K resolution sharpness. Dramatic three-point lighting with strong rim light. Shallow depth of field. Realistic materials and textures. Looks like a still from a Denis Villeneuve film. No illustration feel — fully photographic.
presets.composition: Rule of thirds. Strong foreground-background separation.

presets.name: Isometric 3D
presets.description: Clean isometric blocks with claymorphism or glossy plastic. Studio lighting.
presets.promptFragment: 3D isometric render. Claymorphism or high-gloss plastic textures. Clean studio lighting with soft shadows. Modern UI block aesthetic — looks like Apple keynote slide or Figma marketing illustration. Organized grid placement. No photographic backgrounds.
presets.composition: Centered or grid-aligned. Components float with soft drop shadows.

presets.name: Blueprint Technical
presets.description: Da Vinci notebook ink-on-parchment. Hand-drawn schematic precision.
presets.promptFragment: Leonardo da Vinci notebook style. Warm sepia-toned parchment background with subtle texture. Detailed brown ink technical sketches. Handwritten-style annotations and arrows. Anatomical/architectural precision. Renaissance polymath energy. Includes margin notes and cross-section views.
presets.composition: Central technical drawing surrounded by hand-drawn annotations. Mixed-scale detail callouts.

presets.name: Cyber HUD
presets.description: Restrained futuristic HUD. Cyan glow on dark, no clutter.
presets.promptFragment: Restrained tech HUD aesthetic. Subtle glowing cyan and electric blue data lines on a deep dark background. Floating interface panels with translucent glass effect. Clean wireframe overlays. Minimal but impactful — NOT cluttered cyberpunk. Sophisticated AI visualization. Text fragments hint at data without overwhelming.
presets.composition: Central element with HUD overlay arcs and reticles. Strong negative space around focal point.

presets.name: Lithograph Vintage
presets.description: 19th century scientific engraving. Sepia tones, fine hatch lines.
presets.promptFragment: 19th century scientific lithograph. Engraving style with extremely fine cross-hatching. Sepia and deep brown tones on textured aged paper. Naturalist illustration tradition (Haeckel, Audubon). Botanical/scientific specimen feel. Latin labels in elegant serif. Period-accurate paper grain.
presets.composition: Centered specimen on plain background. Decorative scrolled labels at top/bottom.

presets.name: Educational Comic
presets.description: Vibrant educational comic. Bold outlines, cel-shaded, expressive.
presets.promptFragment: Educational comic illustration. Vibrant saturated colors. Thick confident outlines. Cel-shaded with hard light/shadow boundaries. Expressive characters and clear visual storytelling. Friendly and engaging without being childish. Pixar / Studio Ghibli energy adapted for educational content.
presets.composition: Single panel with one main action. Speech bubbles or callouts optional.

presets.name: Risograph Zine
presets.description: Risograph 2-color halftone print. Indie zine aesthetic.
presets.promptFragment: Risograph print aesthetic. Two-color halftone overlay with visible dot pattern and subtle misregistration between layers. Limited palette (often fluorescent pink + blue, or yellow + black). Imperfect ink density variation. Indie zine / art school print room feel. Slightly grainy paper texture.
presets.composition: Off-center, slightly raw layout. Embraces imperfection.

presets.name: Whiteboard Sketch
presets.description: Hand-drawn whiteboard / Apple Notes sketch. Loose but legible.
presets.promptFragment: Hand-drawn whiteboard or Apple Notes sketch. Loose marker lines in blue, red, and black. Slightly imperfect handwriting for labels. Arrows, boxes, and connectors drawn freehand. Friendly meeting-room or strategy-session feel. White background with subtle marker texture. Looks like someone smart sketched this in 5 minutes during a working session.
presets.composition: Loose flow diagram or strategy sketch. Arrows tie elements together.

presets.name: FrankX Premium Gradient
presets.description: Deep navy → royal purple gradient with cyan glow accents. Glassmorphism. Launches and vision pieces.
presets.promptFragment: Premium gradient hero composition. Background flows from deep navy (#0F172A) through royal purple (#AB47C7) with luminous cyan (#43BFE3) glow accents. Soft glowing orbs and translucent glassmorphism panels with subtle blur. Modern minimalist composition with generous negative space. Selective gold (#F59E0B) highlights only on critical focal points. Premium luxury feel — looks like an Apple keynote backdrop or Stripe press product photo.
presets.composition: Central focal point with strong negative space. Glassmorphism overlays optional. Leaves overlay room for headline text.

presets.name: FrankX Da Vinci Technical
presets.description: Da Vinci notebook on warm parchment. Intellectual rigor for research and architecture.
presets.promptFragment: Leonardo da Vinci notebook style. Warm sepia-toned parchment with subtle aged texture. Detailed brown-ink technical sketches with anatomical/architectural precision. Handwritten-style annotations and arrows in margins. Cross-section diagrams and exploded views. Period-authentic feel adapted to AI/technology subject matter. Subtle FrankX cyan (#43BFE3) accent permitted on a single key element to bridge eras.
presets.composition: Central technical drawing with marginal annotations. Polymath energy — multiple scales coexist.

presets.name: FrankX 3D Isometric
presets.description: Clean isometric blocks in navy + cyan. Workshops and OS module pages.
presets.promptFragment: Clean 3D isometric render in FrankX brand palette. Modern UI blocks with high-gloss plastic or claymorphism textures. Soft studio lighting with subtle shadows. Background gradient from deep navy (#0F172A) to lighter navy. Block highlights in cyan (#43BFE3) with selective purple (#AB47C7) accents. Organized grid layout. Premium documentation aesthetic.
presets.composition: Grid-aligned isometric components. Soft drop shadows. Clear hierarchy.

presets.name: FrankX Business Professional
presets.description: Corporate elegance in navy + gold. Enterprise/strategy/Oracle adjacent.
presets.promptFragment: Corporate elegance. Clean white or light-grey background with deep navy (#0F172A) accents and subtle gold (#F59E0B) highlights. Professional graphs, charts, or organizational diagrams. Executive-presentation quality. Confident and trustworthy. Subtle glassmorphism panels. Stripe Press / McKinsey case-study aesthetic. NO consumer-tech vibe.
presets.composition: Centered or asymmetric balanced layout. Professional hierarchy. Reads as enterprise-grade.

presets.name: FrankX Focused Futuristic
presets.description: Restrained AI HUD in cyan + navy. AI/cutting-edge content.
presets.promptFragment: Restrained AI HUD aesthetic in FrankX brand. Subtle glowing cyan (#43BFE3) data lines on deep navy (#0F172A) background. Floating translucent interface panels. Clean wireframe overlays. Selective purple (#AB47C7) for emphasis. Sophisticated AI visualization — minimal but impactful. NOT cluttered cyberpunk — every element earns its place. Premium agentic system feel.
presets.composition: Central system or model element with HUD overlay. Strong negative space. Reads at a glance.

presets.name: FrankX CoE Blueprint
presets.description: Enterprise CoE diagram. 6-pillar grid. Heavy text labels — uses GPT Image 2.
presets.promptFragment: Enterprise Center of Excellence framework diagram. Six-pillar grid layout (Strategy, Governance, Talent, Technology, Data, Ethics). Each pillar rendered as a clean labeled card with icon. Deep navy (#0F172A) background. Gold (#F59E0B) pillar headers. Cyan (#43BFE3) connecting lines between pillars showing relationships. Clean sans-serif labels rendered crisply inside the image (this is critical — text must be sharp and accurate). Premium consulting deck aesthetic — McKinsey × Apple presentation.
presets.composition: 3x2 grid of pillar cards. Connecting lines showing flow. Title at top.
